import React from 'react'; import './Education.css'; const Education = () => { return (

Education

🎓

Master of Business Administration (MBA)

In Progress

2025 – Present

Currently pursuing MBA alongside hands-on UX design projects and internships to enhance business acumen and design leadership skills.

🔬

Bachelor of Science (B.Sc)

Botany, Zoology, Chemistry

2021 – 2024

Foundation in scientific methodology and analytical thinking, providing strong problem-solving skills applicable to user experience design.

); }; export default Education;
